Package de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2

Class SMTHandlerProperty.StringProperty

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SMTHandlerProperty<String>
de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.newsmt2.SMTHandlerProperty.StringProperty
Enclosing class:
SMTHandlerProperty<T>
public static class SMTHandlerProperty.StringProperty extends SMTHandlerProperty<String>
A property of type String. Any value is allowed, no conversion needed, default is "".

      public boolean verify(String value)
      Description copied from class: SMTHandlerProperty
      Verify that the given string value can be converted to a value of the stored data type
      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      value - potential string representation of a property, not null.
      Returns:
